error.msg: Condition 'next_seq==0U' is always false
error.verbose: Condition 'next_seq==0U' is always false

location.info: Condition 'next_seq==0U' is always false
Assignment 'next_seq=highest_seq+1U', assigned value is greater than 0

error.msg: Condition 'next_seq==0U' is always false
error.verbose: Condition 'next_seq==0U' is always false

location.info: Condition 'next_seq==0U' is always false
Assignment 'next_seq=get_u32(&prev_buf[4])+1U', assigned value is greater than 0

error.msg: Condition 'num_sensors>3' is always false
error.verbose: Condition 'num_sensors>3' is always false

location.info: Condition 'num_sensors>3' is always false
Assignment 'num_sensors=(SENSOR_COUNT>=2)?(SENSOR_COUNT-2):0', assigned value is 3
